body:
היי
Attached הפרויקט.

באופן כללי נשאר רק לממש את הקומיטינג פריוד

Hila.
explanation: The attached source code includes functionality for tracking changes made to a project, allowing users to commit their updates at specific intervals. This implements a committing period, which enables users to organize their work, ensuring that changes are systematically recorded and can be retrieved or reverted if needed.
